🚨 Comment @ Mention Validation Test

Test URL: http://localhost:5173/

✅ BASELINE: PostCreator @ Mentions (Working)
1. Go to main page
2. Click "Start a post..." button
3. Type @ in text area
4. ✅ Should see: "🚨 EMERGENCY DEBUG: Dropdown Open"
✅ BASELINE: QuickPost @ Mentions (Working)
1. Go to /posting page
2. Type @ in quick post field
3. ✅ Should see: "🚨 EMERGENCY DEBUG: Dropdown Open"
🔄 TARGET: Comment @ Mentions (SHOULD NOW WORK)
1. Go to any post with comments
2. Click "Reply" button
3. Type @ in comment text area
4. 🎯 Should NOW see: "🚨 EMERGENCY DEBUG: Dropdown Open"
Critical Fix Applied: Changed mentionContext="comment" → mentionContext="post"
🔄 TARGET: Comment Replies @ Mentions (SHOULD NOW WORK)
1. Find existing comment and click "Reply"
2. Type @ in reply text area
3. 🎯 Should NOW see: "🚨 EMERGENCY DEBUG: Dropdown Open"
Same Fix Applied
🔬 SWARM ANALYSIS RESULTS
Root Cause: mentionContext="comment" vs mentionContext="post"
Agents Deployed: SPARC, TDD, NLD, Mesh Coordinator, Playwright
Fix Applied: Unified all contexts to use mentionContext="post"
Files Modified: /src/components/CommentForm.tsx line 180

Success Criteria: All @ mentions should show identical debug dropdown behavior across PostCreator, QuickPost, Comments, and Comment Replies.
